tluaMultiReturnAssignability.tlua(32,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => number' is not assignable to type '() => (number, string)'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
    Source has 1 element(s) but target requires 2.
tluaMultiReturnAssignability.tlua(36,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type '() => (number, string)'.
  Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
    Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 2.
tluaMultiReturnAssignability.tlua(37,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type '() => (number, (string | nil)?)'.
  Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, (string | nil)?'.
    Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 1.
tluaMultiReturnAssignability.tlua(40,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => (number, string)' is not assignable to type '() => string'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaMultiReturnAssignability.tlua (4 errors) ====
    function pair(): (number, string)
      return 1, "a";
    end
    
    function triple(): (number, string, boolean)
      return 1, "a", true;
    end
    
    function one(): number
      return 1;
    end
    
    function onePlusOptional(): (number, string?)
      return 1;
    end
    
    function allOptional(): (number?, string?)
    end
    
    function nothing(): void
    end
    
    // Extra returned values are dropped at call sites: assigning a many-valued
    // function where fewer values are consumed is sound.
    local toSingle: (() => number) = pair;
    local toPair: typeof pair = triple;
    
    // A one-valued function satisfies a pack whose tail is optional...
    local optOk: typeof onePlusOptional = one;
    
    // ...but not a pack that requires two values.
    local needTwo: typeof pair = one;
          ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => number' is not assignable to type '() => (number, string)'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Source has 1 element(s) but target requires 2.
    
    // Zero values only satisfy packs that require none.
    local voidOk: typeof allOptional = nothing;
    local voidBad: typeof pair = nothing;
          ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type '() => (number, string)'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 2.
    local voidBadRequired: typeof onePlusOptional = nothing;
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type '() => (number, (string | nil)?)'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, (string | nil)?'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 1.
    
    // The first value must still match.
    local firstMismatch: (() => string) = pair;
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => (number, string)' is not assignable to type '() => string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
